issuesFound.title: DropdownMenu trigger button does not update aria‑expanded when opening a menu
issuesFound.explanation: The `register(trigger, panel)` function adds `aria-haspopup` to the trigger but never sets `aria-expanded="true"` when the menu is opened (in `_openInstance`). Screen‑reader users cannot know the menu state.
issuesFound.fix: In `_openInstance` add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after opening the panel.

issuesFound.title: DropdownMenu trigger button missing initial aria‑expanded state on page load
issuesFound.explanation: Triggers are given `aria-haspopup` but no `aria-expanded` attribute is set initially (defaults to undefined). Assistive tech expects an explicit false value.
issuesFound.fix: In `register` after adding `aria-haspopup`, also set `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: DropdownMenu panel is hidden without setting aria‑hidden to true
issuesFound.explanation: `_closeInstance` removes the visible class and adds `hidden` attribute, but does not set `aria-hidden="true"` on the panel. The element remains in the accessibility tree.
issuesFound.fix: In `_closeInstance` after `panel.setAttribute('hidden', '')` add `setAttr(panel, 'aria-hidden', 'true');`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open function does not set aria‑expanded to true on the trigger button
issuesFound.explanation: In `open(item, …)` the panel is shown, but the trigger’s `aria-expanded` attribute is never set to `"true"`. Users of assistive technology cannot detect the expanded state.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` at the start of `open`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion close function does not set aria‑hidden on the answer panel
issuesFound.explanation: `close(item, …)` sets `aria-expanded="false"` on the trigger but only adds `hidden` to the panel; it never sets `aria-hidden="true"`. The hidden panel stays perceivable to AT.
issuesFound.fix: After `item.panel.setAttribute('hidden', '')` add `setAttr(item.panel, 'aria-hidden', 'true');`.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle (on/off switch) does not update aria‑pressed state
issuesFound.explanation: The element with `[data-billing-toggle]` is given `role="switch"` for keyboard support, but the script never updates `aria-pressed` when the user toggles between monthly and annual billing.
issuesFound.fix: In `_onToggleClick` (or after `setPeriod`) call `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-pressed', String(_pricingState.period === 'year'));`.

issuesFound.title: Billing‑period buttons (`[data-period]`) do not reflect selection via aria‑pressed
issuesFound.explanation: Buttons for each period receive an `active` class, but no `aria-pressed` attribute is set, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the current selection.
issuesFound.fix: In `_syncToggleState` iterate over `_periodBtns` and set `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(btn.getAttribute('data-period') === period));`.

issuesFound.title: Inline validation does not set aria‑invalid on invalid fields
issuesFound.explanation: `inlineValidator.validate` uses `srUtils.markInvalid`, which only adds `aria-describedby` and error text but never sets `aria-invalid="true"` on the field. Assistive technologies therefore do not announce the error state.
issuesFound.fix: Modify `srUtils.markInvalid` (or call it) to also execute `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');`. Ensure the counterpart clears the attribute on valid input.

issuesFound.title: Product‑filter UI updates (count badge, empty‑state) are not announced via a live region
issuesFound.explanation: `productFilter.applyFilters` changes the visible product count and empty‑state message, but no `aria-live` region is updated, so users are unaware of the result of their filter action.
issuesFound.fix:
Add a hidden live region (e.g., `
`) and update its text in `_updateCountBadge`/`_updateEmptyState` with a concise status like “12 products shown”.

issuesFound.title: Pricing setPeriod updates displayed prices without a live‑region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When the billing period changes, price numbers are rewritten, but no ARIA live announcement is made, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the new pricing.
issuesFound.fix: After updating all price elements, set the text of a dedicated live region (e.g., `#pricing-status`) to “Prices updated to annual billing”.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation drawer hide does not set aria‑hidden on the drawer element
issuesFound.explanation: `mobileNav.close` removes CSS classes and unlocks scroll but never adds `aria-hidden="true"` to the drawer, so the hidden navigation remains in the accessibility tree.
issuesFound.fix: In `close` after removing the open class, add `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden', 'true');`. Also set `aria-hidden="false"` when opening.

issuesFound.title: Multi‑step wizard step change does not announce the new step via a live region
issuesFound.explanation: `_goToStep` updates focus and visual state but does not provide an ARIA live announcement of the step change, so screen‑reader users cannot track progress.
issuesFound.fix:
After moving focus, call `liveRegion.announce(`Step ${targetIndex + 1} of ${_steps.length}: ${_steps[targetIndex].title}`);`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open does not set aria‑expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: faqAccordion.open adds the “open” class but never updates aria‑expanded on the trigger button, breaking the disclosure pattern.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(item.trigger,'aria-expanded','true'); in open() and set to "false" in close().

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion does not announce panel state
issuesFound.explanation: Opening/closing a FAQ item updates the UI but does not announce the change via a live region, so screen‑reader users are not informed.
issuesFound.fix: After toggling, call liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} ${item.open ? 'expanded' : 'collapsed'}`);.

issuesFound.title: Testimonial carousel navigation does not announce slide changes
issuesFound.explanation: testimonialsCarousel._onKeydown changes slides but does not use liveRegion to announce the new slide number.
issuesFound.fix: After goTo() call liveRegion.announce(`Slide ${target+1} of ${_slides.length}`);.

issuesFound.title: Dynamic content updates in siteSearch do not use live region
issuesFound.explanation: _siteSearch._debouncedFetch updates the suggestion list but never announces the number of results, leaving users unaware of changes.
issuesFound.fix: After rendering suggestions, call liveRegion.announce(`${results.length} suggestion${results.length===1?'':'s'} found`);.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu focus trap does not return focus on close
issuesFound.explanation: dropdownMenu._closeInstance does not restore focus to the trigger after closing, violating focus management guidelines.
issuesFound.fix: After closing, call trigger.focus(); or use a focus‑trap that returns focus.

issuesFound.title: Mobile‑nav overlay does not have aria‑hidden when hidden
issuesFound.explanation: The overlay element is shown/hidden via CSS classes but never receives aria‑hidden, so screen readers may still perceive it.
issuesFound.fix: When hiding the overlay, add _overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true'); and remove it when showing.

issuesFound.title: Product‑filter “view mode” toggle button lacks aria‑pressed state
issuesFound.explanation: The view‑mode buttons (`[data-view-mode]`) toggle layout but never set aria‑pressed, so their state is not conveyed.
issuesFound.fix: After toggling, set setAttr(btn,'aria-pressed',String(btn.getAttribute('data-view-mode')===newMode)); for each button.

issuesFound.title: Pricing comparison table column highlight does not use live region
issuesFound.explanation: planComparisonHighlighter.highlightColumn adds visual highlight but does not announce which plan is highlighted.
issuesFound.fix: After highlighting, call liveRegion.announce(`Plan ${planId} highlighted`);.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle functions missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown panels are shown and hidden, but the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute is not synchronized with the visible state. Assistive technology users cannot perceive whether the dropdown is open.
issuesFound.fix: Line in `_openInstance`: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, true);` after `inst.panel.removeAttribute('hidden');`. Line in `_closeInstance`: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, false);` before `emit(inst.trigger, 'dropdown:close', ...)`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion toggle functions missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: FAQ answer panels are expanded and collapsed via animateHeight, but the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute is never set to "true" or "false". Screen readers cannot convey the expanded state of the accordion items.
issuesFound.fix: Line in `open()`: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` after `item.open = true;`. Line in `close()`: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` after `item.open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle buttons missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The billing period buttons (month/quarter/year) act as a toggle group indicating the active selection, but they do not set aria-pressed to communicate the pressed state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line inside `_periodBtns.forEach(btn => { ... })`: Add `setAttr(btn, ARIA.PRESSED, isActive);` after `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);`.

issuesFound.title: Product filter tab buttons missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: Filter tab buttons toggle the active category but do not convey their selected state via aria-pressed. Screen reader users cannot identify which filter is currently active.
issuesFound.fix: Line inside `qsa('[data-filter-value]', _tabsEl).forEach(btn => { ... })`: Add `setAttr(btn, ARIA.PRESSED, isActive);` after `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav open action not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Opening the mobile navigation drawer is a significant context change that is not announced to screen readers. Users navigating with assistive technology receive no feedback that the menu has opened.
issuesFound.fix: Line at end of `open()` function: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navOpen || 'Navigation menu opened');`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav close action not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Closing the mobile navigation drawer is not announced to screen readers, leaving users unaware that the menu has closed and focus has moved.
issuesFound.fix: Line at end of `close()` function (before or after emit): Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed');`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu open action not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Opening a dropdown menu is not announced to screen readers. Users may not realize that additional navigation options have become available.
issuesFound.fix: Line at end of `_openInstance`: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.dropdownOpened || 'Menu opened');`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu close action not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Closing a dropdown menu is not announced to screen readers, potentially disorienting users when focus moves or the menu disappears.
issuesFound.fix: Line at end of `_closeInstance`: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.dropdownClosed || 'Menu closed');`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open action not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding an FAQ item reveals new content that is not announced to screen readers. Users may not perceive that the answer text is now visible.
issuesFound.fix: Line after `emit(_containerEl, 'faq:open', ...)` in `open()`: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.faqOpened(item.title) || '${item.title} answer expanded');`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion close action not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Collapsing an FAQ item is not announced, leaving screen reader users unaware that the content has been hidden.
issuesFound.fix: Line after `emit(_containerEl, 'faq:close', ...)` in `close()`: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.faqClosed(item.title) || '${item.title} answer collapsed');`.

issuesFound.title: productFilter applyFilters action not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Applying filters updates the product grid and count badge, but the result (e.g., "Showing 5 products") is not announced to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line after `emit(_gridEl, 'filter:applied', ...)` in `applyFilters`: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.filterApplied(_productFilterState.activeCategory) || 'Showing ${_productFilterState.activeCategory} products');`.

issuesFound.title: scrollToTop click action not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Clicking the scroll-to-top button scrolls the page but does not announce the action to screen readers, unlike the keyboard shortcut which does announce.
issuesFound.fix: Line at start of `_onClick()` function: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.scrolledToTop || 'Scrolled back to top of page');`.

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator not setting aria-invalid on validation
issuesFound.explanation: When validation fails, the field is not marked with aria-invalid="true", and when validation passes, aria-invalid is not cleared. Screen readers cannot convey the invalid state of form fields.
issuesFound.fix: Line in `if (result.valid) { ... }` block: Add `removeAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID);` or `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'false');`. Line in `else { ... }` block (invalid): Add `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'true');` after `srUtils.markInvalid(field, errorEl);`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav aria-expanded not initialised at page load
issuesFound.explanation: The navigation toggle button does not have aria-expanded="false" set initially when the drawer is closed on page load. Screen readers assume an undefined expanded state.
